1787720.name: Fantasy Grounds - Blighted Lands III - Isle of Ill Omen
1787720.description:
World of Okkorim/Blighted Lands III - Isle of Ill Omen

Luke Gygax & Jim Ward
The Isle of Ill-Omen takes the players across the sea searching for a lost island to recover a beautiful piece of artwork for the Wazir's birthday. This is the third and final adventure designed by Luke and James. The players must discover the means of getting to the isle, defeating the unusual creatures inhabiting it and get back intact and on time to present the item at the Wazir's birthday celebration. Of course there are a few twists along the way too....
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Terry Buckingham
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and a one time purchase of the Castles & Crusades ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
